name: Strawberry Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook margarine and sugar with the egg and dates for 5 minutes.
2. Gradually add flour, mixing well. Continue cooking for an additional 7 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in salt, nuts, vanilla, and Rice Krispies. Ensure the mixture is well combined and not allowed to cool.
4. Shape the mixture into strawberry forms.
5. Place the cookies on a baking sheet with red sugar. Gently shake to coat them evenly.
6. Create stems using green icing.
Note: Strawberry jello can be used instead of red sugar for coating the cookies.
